packageRules.description: Disable major version updates — tracked in Dependency Dashboard issue, merge manually when ready
Group patch updates per package manager; hold 7 days so the community can catch supply-chain attacks before auto-merging on green CI
Group minor updates per package manager; hold 14 days so the community can catch supply-chain attacks before auto-merging on green CI
CVE / vulnerability alerts (patch or minor): bypass age gate entirely, auto-merge immediately once CI is green
CVE / vulnerability alerts requiring a major bump: re-enable (overrides the major-disable rule) and flag for urgent manual review
